Quality Education.reason: Links to Target 4.7 ('knowledge and skills for sustainable development') via '全民國防教育的功能'.
The course itself is a form of tertiary education, "全民國防教育" (All-out Defense Education), providing specific knowledge related to national citizenship, which tangentially links to Target 4.7.
evidence: 全民國防教育軍事訓練課程

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course mentions "國防與經濟" (Defense and Economy), which has a minimal, inferred link to national economic stability, a precondition for growth (Target 8.1).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The concept of "全民防衛" (Civil defense) implies developing resilient infrastructure to withstand crises, which relates to Target 9.1, though not explicitly detailed.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The focus on "全民防衛" (Civil defense) directly supports building community resilience to disasters and conflicts, aligning with Target 11.5 and 11.b.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about strong national institutions for security. It explicitly covers "軍法教育" (Military law education) (Target 16.3) and defense capacity building (Target 16.a).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course promotes "全民參與" (public participation) and "全民動員" (public mobilization), reflecting a civil society partnership (Target 17.17) to achieve national security goals.
